headline: Intuit Reshapes Small Business Leadership What It May Mean For Investors
summary: Intuit (NasdaqGS:INTU) is changing leadership in its Small Business Group as Marianna Tessel steps down. Ashley Still will take on combined leadership of Intuit's Small Business Group and Mid-Market Group. The reorganization affects a core part of Intuit's operations focused on small business and mid sized customers. For investors watching Intuit, the Small Business Group sits at the center of the company’s ecosystem for accountants, sole proprietors, and growing firms. This unit, alongside...
